name: Cajun Bayou Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the liquid ingredients and spices in a bag to create a marinade.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
3. Place the chicken in the bag and seal it tightly.
4. Marinate the chicken in the refrigerator for 2 hours.
5. After marinating, drain the chicken and discard the marinade.
6. Grill, bake, broil, or saute the chicken as desired until fully cooked.
7. Refrigerate any leftovers.
